Knotted Turtlebone Ring  
 

Lore Item
Slot: FINGER
AC: 5
STR: +3 HP: +25 MANA: +35
Effect: Enduring Breath (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except WAR MNK BRD ROG BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Knotted Turtlebone Ring
Lore Item
Slot: FINGER
AC: 5
STR: +3 HP: +25 MANA: +35
Effect: Enduring Breath (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except WAR MNK BRD ROG BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:11 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1555
Submitted By:Nindar Astraltraveler
Lucy Entry By:Divine
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-14 02:18:34
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 1,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 58

This item is found on creatures.

NPC Name
Lodizal

Iceclad Ocean

the ring is like a fishbone earring, wear it and it works until it is taken off.Personally i think this ring is better than some of the rings i use(luclin effect ones, SV, and some other plain stat rings)

#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 08 2002 at 10:29 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Bah they should make a permanent invis ring now they're at it! =)

QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2005 at 5:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591834188354
4 posts
One ring to rule them all!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 25 2002 at 7:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yeah, but how would you atatck invisable? you would have to take the ring off, attack and put it back on when you wanted invis, unless it is clickable......
Price....
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 9:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767089005
View User Forum
212 posts
What I want to know is why is this thing so cheap?
This is SO much better than the Fishbone Earring, mainly because of the extra stats on it.
With 35 mana, a Druid does not lose all that much, and if your wis is near 200 anyway, this will not hurt. My wis is 195 wearing this ring. In fact, I have 7 items without wis, so I am not too worried about wisdom at my level anymore. Soon, I will have 200wis from like 3 items... hehe

Anyway, I think this ring rocks. I would rather spend 10k on this, than 4k on the fishbone earring.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 08 2002 at 1:22 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Goodie for you......
RE: Price....
QuoteReply
# May 25 2002 at 1:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777582516
View User Forum
23 posts
to the best of my knowledge, wisdom always could go above up to 255... please, correct me if im wrong~

QuoteReply

Tillas
94 posts

# Dec 28 2000 at 2:01 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Its NOT warrior usable.
▲ Page top
RE: Umm, anyone notice this ...
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2002 at 2:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765772243
9 posts
It's "caster" wearable. Meaning any and all who can cast can wear this ring. Sorry Warriors, Rogues, Monks need not apply. Also as a note BST can not wear this ring the pic just hasn't been updated since Luclin was released.
▲ Page top
RE: Umm, anyone notice this ...
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2000 at 2:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750246577
Scholar
21 posts
or Monk or Rogue or Bard
▲ Page top
RE: Umm, anyone notice this ...
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2001 at 10:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246460789
View User Forum
513 posts
Want to know why?

Because finally someone realized that items that give Mana don't need to be useable by classes that don't use Mana.

I'm glad my Paladin won't have to argue with some warrior over looting rights for this ring.
▲ Page top
Here's the deal
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2001 at 7:38 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
When Lodizal dies, all the tanks and healers want the shell. It can be turned in for a cloak (well, a shield that fits in the back slot) that is as uber as the better dragon lewtz.

So, if this ring drops it will go to a caster, unless a pickup group kills Lodizal (hehe). That caster will probably have something much better for normal use, but will use this ring like a fishbone earring: for when it's time to go swimming :)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 02 2001 at 10:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) just a note.. anyone who uses the words uber and lewtz in the same sentence had better be kidding )
RE: Umm, anyone notice this ...
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2001 at 5:52 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I agree. Theres plenty of other rings that a warrior could use. This is not one of them. The AC, STR, and HP are nice but there is better. Granted, this would be nice on a warrior but hybrids or casters with their notoriously low STR would benefit more from it.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 11 2001 at 10:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) But... don't bards suck?

▲ Page top
What does he hit for?
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2000 at 11:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750413672
3 posts
Can some please tell me what he hits for, i heard he had 32000hp and is copletly MR, i also heard he is only hits for 70s, is this true, if so, he is a dead turtle.
▲ Page top
RE: What does he hit for?
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2002 at 6:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759136252
176 posts
He bit me for 300, bit for 250, bit for 200, bit for 230, bit for 250 again, then spit my corpse out on the ground. That's all it took when I tangled with him at level 33. :)
▲ Page top
RE: What does he hit for?
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2002 at 7:29 AM Rating: Decent
karanthal
106 posts
Theres another Turtle in Iceclad called coruduth, hes got very high MR and hits in the 70s even though its about lvl 5. Might be that one your thinking of
▲ Page top
RE: What does he hit for?
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2000 at 1:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756522392
1 post
He hits for alot, between 150 - 200 give or take. It took us 3 high lvl groups to kill him, but it probably coulf have been done with 2. The trick is to wait for him to spawn and start attacking the 2 named gnolls, they will knock him down a signficant amount of hp before you fight him. Then debuff like crazy, hes not mrs but at such a high lvl it will be hard to get spells to stick. One last thing, he can't cast spells, but he can summon you, so if he locks onto a caster that person is as good as dead.
▲ Page top
RE: What does he hit for?
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2001 at 7:04 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Wtf 3 groups!?!? Only took me 3 people, shammy to slow, warrior to tank, and monk to do damage. Don't know how you took 3 groups /shrug
▲ Page top
RE: What does he hit for?
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2002 at 8:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764342587
16 posts
Ummmm, you are full of it! I have seen Lodi wipe out 3 groups of 50-55ish np. 3 people, lol
▲ Page top
RE: What does he hit for?
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2002 at 6:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750465643
23 posts
Actually he might not be full of it. I have killed Lodi with 1 pickup group. That's right 6 people. And none of us died. We kited him. Wasn't hard at all.
▲ Page top
RE: What does he hit for?
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2002 at 4:54 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591773994568
Guru
658 posts
He may well not be full of it.

My guild has killed Lodizal several times, and usually with only one group. We killed him this morning with one group, and the mage (epic Arch Mage - my RL wife) didn't even have her pet out. There's quite a bit of difference in power between people "50-55" and people 60 with 12+ AA points each.

Gelaan
Phantasmist of Forsaken Unity
Vazaelle

Lodizal
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2000 at 10:52 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Who or what is a Lodizal
▲ Page top
RE: Lodizal
QuoteReply
# Dec 15 2000 at 1:21 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
He's a big *** lvl 60 turtle who kills everything in sight around the gnolls in iceclad ocean, oh yeah and he can summon you if you try to run.
▲ Page top
RE: Lodizal
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2004 at 3:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771345677
View User Forum
28 posts
just an fyi, mobs that can summon wont do it till they have taken 2% damage. so if you were just running by and saw him after he spawned, and you managed to get aggro, if you run he wont summon you.
▲ Page top
cool
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2000 at 3:40 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
was about to say it would be a nice hybrid ring till i saw the effect. with endure breath, the hp and ac it could be a diecent ring for just about any class.
▲ Page top
Sweet
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2000 at 2:35 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I really love how many items are coming out of Velious with unlimited charge effects on them. Soon I'll be carrying around a backpack of items that don't do much of anything but save a spells slot so I can mem a nuke instead. =)
Enduring breath is a great one to have on this item too. Woot I love it. Especially since clerics don't ever get endure breath.

# Dec 14 2000 at 1:31 PM Rating: Default

▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2002 at 2:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784294922
4 posts
The effect is permenant, so as long as you wear it you'll have enduring breath.
